hooks.command: for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx eslint --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; done

TOOL_INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"command":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"command":"//;s/"$//'); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) WEB_CHANGES=$(git diff HEAD~1 --name-only -- apps/web/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$WEB_CHANGES" ]; then echo 'This commit touched apps/web/. If this is a new feature or significant change, consider running /mobile-parity to check for mobile parity tickets.'; fi;; esac; exit 0
for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */pnpm-lock.yaml|*/.env.local|*/.env|*/types.gen.ts) echo "BLOCK: Protected file: $f" && exit 2;; esac; done

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */supabase/migrations/*.sql) git -C /Users/beanie/source/trainers.gg ls-files --error-unmatch "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit committed migration $f — create a new migration instead" && exit 2;; esac; done

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */apps/web/middleware.ts) echo "BLOCK: Next.js 16 uses proxy.ts for request interception. Creating middleware.ts will break all routes (404 on every page)." && exit 2;; esac; done
